Description: The Dome of the Rock with its golden dome on a raised platform. I chose this place because it holds deep spiritual and personal significance.
Kaaba, the black cube at the center of Makkah, surrounded by 4 minarets and many worshippers. I chose it for its deep religious importance and spiritual connection to my faith.
Snow-capped mountains and a calm lake. I chose it because I love nature and enjoy adventurous landscapes.
Venice’s old buildings and a canal with many boats. I chose it because I love seeing beautiful places that feel peaceful and inspiring.
Kawarau Gorge Suspension Bridge with its ropes and structure surrounded with yellow trees. I chose it because it’s the most famous bungee jumping spot in the world, and I want to try it myself.
Aurora Lights over snowy mountains and a rocky beach. I chose it because I love magical natural scenes and adventure.
View of Santorini, with its white houses on the cliffs and the sea in the distance. I chose it because it gives a peaceful and relaxing feeling.
Blue waters in the Maldives with a snorkeler, showing the clear water and the sea floor with coral visible beneath. I chose it because I want to explore the underwater world there.
The historic Communication Palace with the Cibeles Fountain in front of it. I chose it because I want to explore the old architecture and the stunning surroundings.
Yasaka Pagoda tower rising above the traditional streets. I chose it because I want to explore the culture.
